title: Events Radar
content:
# Event Radar — Week of April 6, 2026

## 🔥 Next 30 Days (April 6 - May 6)

### GALA WorldReady Conference 2026
**April 12-14, 2026 | Berlin, Germany**

**Why it matters:** Premier localization and globalization conference with focus on business leadership, emerging technologies, and practice. Perfect for understanding enterprise localization pain points and showcasing QA solutions. Direct access to decision-makers from global brands.

**Key Focus:** Enterprise-level solutions, cutting-edge processes, cross-sector case studies

**Registration:** [LocWorld Events](https://locworld.com)

---

### MicroConf US 2026
**April 12-14, 2026 | Portland, Oregon, USA**

**Why it matters:** Premier conference for bootstrapped and indie SaaS founders. Great for understanding SaaS GTM strategies, connecting with potential early adopters, and learning about product-led growth approaches.

**Target Audience:** SaaS founders, bootstrap community

**Registration:** [MicroConf.com](https://microconf.com/us-flagship)

---

### SaaStock USA 2026
**April 15-16, 2026 | Austin, Texas (Palmer Events Center)**

**Why it matters:** Where software leaders cut through uncertainty with AI in B2B software. Features structured 1:1 meetings with industry shapers. Perfect for customer discovery and partnerships with SaaS companies needing localization QA.

**Key Focus:** AI in B2B SaaS, structured networking

**Registration:** [SaaStock USA](https://saastock-usa.com/)

---

### AI+IM Global Summit 2026
**April 28-30, 2026 | Baltimore**

**Why it matters:** Information management + AI focus with hands-on workshops and real-world case studies. Relevant for understanding enterprise data governance challenges that impact localization quality assurance.

**Key Focus:** AI & Information Management, multiple learning tracks

**Registration:** [AIIM Global Summit](https://www.aiim.org/aiim-global-summit-2026)

---

## 📅 Next 60 Days (May 7 - June 6)

### SaaSiest 2026
**May 5-6, 2026 | Malmö, Sweden**

**Why it matters:** 1000+ Founders, Executives, and VCs focused on functional AI applications. Strong emphasis on real peer-led AI examples showing automation, efficiency, and results. Perfect for demonstrating NotVerify's AI-powered QA capabilities and agent orchestration.

**Key Focus:** Functional How-To AI, roundtables, guided workshops

**Registration:** [SaaSiest 2026](https://saasiest2026.com/)

---

### Global RegTech Summit 2026
**May 20, 2026 | London, UK**

**Why it matters:** World's largest RegTech event focusing on compliance, risk management, and regulatory technology. Critical for understanding compliance requirements in regulated industries (finance, healthcare) that need localization QA with audit trails.

**Key Focus:** AI-driven compliance solutions, financial crime prevention

**Registration:** [Global RegTech Summit](https://fintech.global/globalregtechsummit/)

---

### AAMAS 2026 (Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems)
**May 25-29, 2026 | Paphos, Cyprus**

**Why it matters:** THE largest and most influential conference in agents and multiagent systems. Essential for staying current on agent orchestration research, multi-agent collaboration patterns, and autonomous system design - core to NotVerify's architecture.

**Target Audience:** Researchers, AI engineers, multiagent system builders

**Registration:** [AAMAS 2026](https://cyprusconferences.org/aamas2026/)

---

### ACM CAIS 2026 (Conference on AI and Agentic Systems)
**May 26-29, 2026 | San Jose, California**

**Why it matters:** Peer-reviewed research on architectural patterns, optimization, and evaluation of agentic AI systems. Covers RAG, multi-agent, and tool-augmented designs. Perfect for technical credibility and staying ahead of agentic AI trends.

**Key Topics:** RAG, multi-agent architectures, engineering agentic systems

**Registration:** [ACM CAIS](https://www.caisconf.org/)

---

### TAUS Massively Multilingual AI Conference - Rome
**June 3-5, 2026 | Rome, Italy**

**Why it matters:** 14,000+ registered attendees focused on European translation technology. Covers machine translation, quality estimation, AI orchestration, and multilingual content systems. Direct overlap with NotVerify's core value proposition.

**Key Focus:** MT, quality estimation, AI orchestration for localization

**Registration:** [TAUS Rome](https://www.taus.net/events/massively-multilingual-ai-conference-rome-2026)

⚠️ **SPEAKER DEADLINE ALERT:** Check TAUS website for speaking submission deadlines - typically 2-3 months before event

---

### Agentic AI Summit
**June 4, 2026 | New York (Convene 360 Madison Avenue)**

**Why it matters:** Focused summit on operationalizing agentic AI responsibly and profitably. Tracks include Enterprise Strategy & Metrics, Orchestration & Lifecycle Management, Governance & Data Foundations.

**Key Focus:** Enterprise agentic AI operationalization

**Registration:** [Agentic AI Summit](https://world.aiacceleratorinstitute.com/location/agenticainewyork)

---

## 📆 Later This Year (July - December)

### LocWorld55 Dublin
**June 9-11, 2026 | Dublin, Ireland**

**Why it matters:** One of the largest global events in translation and localization business and technology. Strong emphasis on enterprise-level solutions and cross-sector case studies. Major networking opportunity with enterprise localization buyers.

**Key Focus:** Enterprise localization, cutting-edge processes

**Registration:** [LocWorld Dublin](https://locworld.com/events/locworld55-dublin-2026/)

---

### The AI Enterprise Conference 2026
**September 1, 2026 | New York (Pier Sixty)**

**Why it matters:** Nation's largest enterprise-focused data & AI event showing how to implement, scale, and lead with AI across organizations. Perfect for enterprise customer acquisition and understanding AI adoption challenges.

**Target Audience:** Enterprise executives, AI implementation leaders

**Registration:** [AI Enterprise Conference](https://www.eventbrite.com/e/the-ai-enterprise-conference-2026-tickets-1902063135039)

---

### AI Infra Summit 2026
**September 15-17, 2026 | Santa Clara Convention Center, California**

**Why it matters:** The ultimate stage for AI infrastructure players. Unique blend of systems and AI market intelligence. Relevant for understanding infrastructure requirements for scaling agentic systems.

**Key Focus:** AI infrastructure, systems architecture

**Registration:** [AI Infra Summit](https://www.ai-infra-summit.com/)

---

### TAUS Massively Multilingual AI Conference - Vancouver
**October 14-16, 2026 | Vancouver, BC, Canada**

**Why it matters:** Examines shift from Translation Memory to NMT to LLMs and autonomous agents. Directly aligned with NotVerify's AI-powered approach. West Coast North America presence for networking.

**Key Focus:** LLMs in translation, autonomous agent systems

**Registration:** [TAUS Vancouver](https://www.taus.net/events)

---

### LocWorld56 Vancouver
**October 19-21, 2026 | Vancouver, BC, Canada**

**Why it matters:** Second major LocWorld of the year, North America focus. Can combine with TAUS Vancouver trip (same city, same month). Double networking opportunity.

**Registration:** [LocWorld Vancouver](https://locworld.com/events/locworld56-vancouver-2026/)

---

### Languages & The Media
**November 4-6, 2026 | London, UK**

**Why it matters:** Leading international conference for audiovisual translation, accessibility, media localization, and language technology. Growing sector with increasing compliance requirements (accessibility regulations).

**Key Focus:** Media localization, accessibility, AV translation

**Registration:** Check [MultiLingual Events](https://multilingual.com/events/)

---

## 🎯 Strategic Recommendations

### Immediate Priorities (Next 30 Days)
1. **GALA WorldReady (April 12-14):** Register NOW if still available - this is the enterprise localization crowd you need to reach
2. **SaaStock USA (April 15-16):** Structured 1:1 meetings = high-value customer discovery

### High-Value Targets (Next 60 Days)
1. **SaaSiest (May 5-6):** 1000+ founders/execs, strong AI focus - prime for demos
2. **TAUS Rome (June 3-5):** 14K attendees, direct industry overlap - consider sponsorship or speaking
3. **AAMAS (May 25-29):** Academic credibility for agent orchestration tech

### Speaking Opportunities
⚠️ **ACTION REQUIRED:** Check submission deadlines for:
- TAUS Rome (June 3-5) - deadline likely approaching
- LocWorld55 Dublin (June 9-11) - deadline may have passed, check for lightning talks
- Languages & The Media (Nov 4-6) - likely accepting submissions now

### Geographic Clustering
- **Europe Spring:** Berlin (April 12-14) → Malmö (May 5-6) → London (May 20) → Rome (June 3-5) → Dublin (June 9-11)
- **West Coast Fall:** Santa Clara (Sept 15-17) → Vancouver (Oct 14-21)

### Competitor Intelligence
- Expect major localization platforms at LocWorld and TAUS events
- Watch for AI translation startups at TAUS and agentic AI conferences
- Monitor speaking lineups for competitive positioning opportunities

---

## 📊 Event Priority Matrix

**Must Attend (Customer Acquisition):**
- GALA WorldReady (April 12-14)
- TAUS Rome (June 3-5)
- LocWorld55 Dublin (June 9-11)
- SaaStock USA (April 15-16)

**High Value (Technical Credibility):**
- AAMAS 2026 (May 25-29)
- ACM CAIS 2026 (May 26-29)
- AI Enterprise Conference (Sept 1)

**Strategic (Market Intelligence):**
- SaaSiest 2026 (May 5-6)
- Global RegTech Summit (May 20)
- Agentic AI Summit (June 4)

---

*Next radar update: April 13, 2026*
